messages.content:
Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

My Dear Lord Chosen One Mr. Cameron McCaffrey,

 

Brother, my Calvary greetings and best God wishes to you and your family.

 

Thank you so much for your quick response by sending your ID and personal information, which this very Godly assignment needed considering my present critical cancer ill health. 

 

AS YOU FORWARD THIS VERY VITAL INFORMATION TO THE BANK, PLEASE SEND YOUR OWN ID URGENTLY FOR THE FULL COMMENCEMENT OF THE PROCESS WITH MY BANK.



I am responding to you without any much delay because of the uncertainty of my present critical cancer illness, which at times I used to be unconscious for days and weeks, hence the preparation of the Letter of Authorization on my sick bed through the help of my nurse, and it is very necessary that I send it to you at this stage quickly, now that I am conscious.

 

I am sure with all these vital documents in your possession, you will not have any problem whatsoever both from your country and Swedish government in receiving the inheritance funds in your name legally from my bank for the donations.

 

So now it is my sincerely position to inform you that this US$10,700,000.00 is presently in my BANK (REFORM COMMERCIAL SAVINGS BANK ) in Sweden and the management just wrote me as the Legitimate beneficiary to come forward to receive the money after keeping it for so long or rather issue a Letter of Authorization to somebody to receive it on my behalf since I cannot come over as a result of my cancer illness, or they get it confiscated.

 

Based on this development, I am sending you hereby a Letter of Authorization, Deposit Certificate of the fund and Secret Code of the Deposit to you which you will send to the bank on behalf of me and I will also send them an email which will prove that you are the new beneficiary of my funds and you will be able to contact the bank for a quick release of the money to you as the new beneficiary to receive the fund.

 

More so, because of uncertainty condition of my ill health, I will instruct my bank to immediately set up a Non-residential online banking account in your name and make sure the total inheritance sum of US$10,700,000.00 is credited into the new account, and all the necessary access information be sent to you immediately.  After which ATM CARD or INT'L CREDIT CARD will also be linked to the new account and issued to you after the activation of the new account accordingly.

 

This very process is very important to me to make sure the process of the inheritance payment is ready in your name due to my present critical illness which I am not sure of leaving on or after the 8 weeks, so that the bank will surely release the funds legally to you once the ongoing process is completed successfully.

 

The completion of the due process also will take care of the strict Protective Measure Condition by which I deposited the funds with the bank, which will ethically enable the bank to observe the Swedish laws in releasing the funds to you legally.

 

Please my dear brother, I need you to follow the bank instructions as they will lead you until you have access to the money.

 

Hence I will truly clarify to you again as a Christian family note that due to the strict nature of the deposit as you can see in the Deposit Certificate, the bank cannot make any deduction from the fund for now till all the documentations process are duly in your name legally as my purported beneficiary.

 

This is as a result of a strict Security Protective Measure I took for the deposit to avoid any intruder from tampering with the fund even when I am no more on this earth, except my purported beneficiary like you.

 

As a result, I would like to support you in the process of this Godly project with little cash left with me at the moment for my continued medical treatment in case the need arises in the course of the transaction.

 

For example, this is the security protective measure POST-NO-WITHDRAWAL (PNW) which is for Security Reasons essentially an instruction to not allow any withdrawals or transfers from the account owner's bank accounts till the new beneficiary like you receives the fund, as you can see in the attached Deposit Certificate.


The security question = who is your best friend.
The security answer is  = God is my best friend.
The CERT # is REFORM/COM/SAVINGS/BK07/1163/2 1

I'm sending you this requirement which is needed from you to the bank. I managed to get all the requirements through the help of a nurse who brought a lawyer to me.

 

Please send all the information directly to the CEO of the bank.

 thomas edward cork  1407 hester drive lakeland florida 33801 usa  age 83  12/30/1940  retired  i cannot hear text only 863-661-1778 text only  drivers license c620-825-40-470-0 expires 12/2026  no scanner thanks for helping me and mrs juliet lewis
His name is Mr. Nilsson Forsberg,

Email Address:<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

 

Again, I appreciate your help and I want to assure you that you will be rewarded and you will get 40% for yourself and use the 60% to accomplish my wishes, I just want you to carry out my last wish and make sure you do and act as I have instructed you to handle the money which will be in your favor as my legal chosen representative to receive the money presently at the bank’s custody.

 

Please do not relent in your ceaseless daily prayers and always commit us who are sick to be healed and to find good health. Again it shall be well with you and your family too. You will never witness this kind of bitter and unpleasant experience in your life.

 

May God bless you richly for this wonderful intervention.

 

Please act fast now as I wait to hear from you and please commit me to your daily prayers.

 

Awaiting for your quick response on this request and important update my beloved.

 

God bless you abundantly.

 

Mrs. Juliet Lewis,

Yours sister in Christ.

Subject: Urgent Assistance & Prayers for Mrs. Lewis

Dear Mrs. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Calvary greetings to you too! I was deeply touched by your message and I must confess it's a great honor to be chosen by someone as brave and kind-hearted as you are, especially in these trying times of your health challenges. Your faith and determination are truly inspiring, and I pray earnestly for your swift recovery and peace throughout this ordeal.

Having received your detailed instructions and the essence of your last wish, I want to assure you of my utmost commitment to act swiftly and with all due diligence to ensure your desires are fulfilled to the letter. The gravity of this responsibility is not lost on me, and I consider it a divine appointment to be of service to you and to the extension of your legacy.

Regarding the information requested by the bank and to further the process, I wish to inform you that I will be sending my identification details to Mr. Nilsson Forsberg at the earliest convenience. I believe in maintaining utmost transparency and trustworthiness through this process, as these are vital components in accomplishing your wishes.

It's with a humble heart that I accept the task of being the steward of the funds and promise to use the 60% as you have instructed for philanthropic efforts and to carry out your last wishes earnestly. The thought of being able to contribute to such a noble cause fills me with an indescribable sense of purpose and gratitude.

On a practical note, I understand that due to the protective measures you've put in place, there will be no deductions from the fund until the transition is legally finalized. Rest assured, I am prepared to support the process financially if necessary, to ensure a smooth transition and eventual disbursement of the funds as you have directed.

Please find attached my identification details and any other necessary information you might require from me:

[Note: For security reasons and the integrity of our communication, attach fictitious or generalized information here. Do not send real personal information.]

As for the security question and the answer, I have noted it and will keep it confidential, only to be used for the purposes of securing the fund's release.

I anticipate your instructions regarding the next steps and any direct communication I should have with the bank. Also, I'll keep you in my prayers daily, believing in the miraculous for your health, and I encourage you to remain strong in faith.

May the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, guard your heart and mind.

Looking forward to your swift response.

Yours sincerely,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Greetings Sir/Madam,
My name is Mr GreenWay.I am the principal partner at Ron Williams & Co., United Kingdom, and also in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. I apologies if my letter came to you as a surprise, since there has been no previous correspondence between us. There is an unclaimed “permanent life insurance policy” held by our deceased client.

The transaction pertains to an unclaimed “transfer on death” (“TOD”) savings monetary deposit in the sum of eighteen million, three hundred and fifty thousand United States dollars. The policyholder was one of our clients, the late Mr Robert Morgan, who was an investor and precious stone dealer. He died in an auto crash over nine years ago. Since his death, no one has come forward for the claim, and all our efforts to locate his relatives have proved unsuccessful.



The insurance company code stipulates that “insured permanent policies" not claimed must be turned over to the abandoned property division of the state after 10 years. Therefore, I ask for your consent to be in partnership with me for the claim of this policy benefit, in view of the fact that you share the same last name and nationality as the deceased. If you permit me to add your name to the policy, all proceeds will be processed on your behalf. I wish to point out that I want 10% of this money to be shared among charity organizations, while the remaining 90% will be shared between us.

This is 100% risk-free; I do have all necessary documentation to expedite the process in a highly professional and confidential manner. I will provide all the relevant documents to substantiate your claim as the beneficiary. This claim requires a high level of confidentiality, and it may take up to thirty (30) business days from the date of receipt of your consent. Kindly provide a reachable contact number for faster communication. For more details, please contact me at (<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>) .


Your earliest response to this matter would be highly appreciated.

Regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Subject: Partnership Proposal for Life Insurance Policy Claim

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. I was quite surprised to receive your email, but I must admit, intrigued by the proposition outlined within it. The details regarding the unclaimed “permanent life insurance policy” tied to the late Mr. Robert Morgan, who curiously shares my last name, have certainly piqued my interest. The coincidence seems like a serendipitous opportunity that's too significant to pass up, especially given the potential benefits earmarked for charity and ourselves.

While the nature of this proposal is unexpected, I understand the urgency and the sensitive timeframe we're working against, given the insurance company's code regarding unclaimed policies. I am eager to learn more about how we can proceed in a manner that ensures full compliance with all legal requirements and guarantees the security and confidentiality of the transaction.

Your altruistic desire to allocate 10% of the funds to charity organizations aligns with my values, and it strengthens my interest in partnering with you on this claim. The prospect of doing well by doing good—together with the opportunity to engage in a mutually beneficial arrangement—has motivated me to respond promptly.

As requested, I am ready to provide a reachable contact number for more direct communications. However, I am also mindful of the importance of maintaining a high level of confidentiality throughout this process. Before proceeding further, could you kindly share a bit more detail regarding the documentation you have that substantiates the claim? Understanding the nature of these documents will help me better prepare for the next steps and ensure that I can provide whatever assistance you need with the utmost efficiency and discretion.

Email: cmccaff1@fau.edu

I look forward to your detailed response and any instructions you may have on how I can assist in moving this process forward. Thank you for considering me as a partner in this endeavour. I am ready to cooperate fully, subject to understanding all legal and ethical implications before committing.

Awaiting your prompt response.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey

Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for the documents and your WhatsApp number, which reflect your genuine commitment to this cause. I have perused the documents you sent over and, allow me to express, they indeed outline a clear pathway to what promises to be a fruitful partnership.

However, before we proceed to the next stage of signing the memorandum of understanding (MOU) and exchanging further personal information, I encountered a slight hiccup with my current WhatsApp setup which I am in the process of resolving. It appears my recent phone update unsettled a few apps, WhatsApp included. Rest assured, I am addressing this with the urgency it demands, recognizing the importance of establishing our direct line of communication posthaste.

In the meantime, may I suggest that we continue our detailed discussions via email? This will ensure we maintain momentum on this matter while I rectify the WhatsApp situation on my end. I believe we can cover substantial ground on the specifics of the MOU through our email correspondence.

To expedite our engagement further, I am considering preparing a set of queries regarding our agreement and the steps that follow thereafter. This includes any preparatory actions on my part, the documentation timeline, and the intricacies involved in the verification process on my end. Could you please provide insight into whether there are any immediate responsibilities that I should be aware of or any additional information I need to prepare?

I also wanted to touch base on the matter of the initial costs once more, as detailed in our MOU. While I understand such processes require financial inputs, could we elaborate on the specific nature of these costs? This will enable me to prepare accordingly and ensure a seamless process on my part.

Lastly, I did have a fleeting thought about the practical aspects of transferring Mr. Jose Mediavilla’s assets. Your guidance on the procedural steps, anticipated challenges, and how we might navigate these will be invaluable.

I eagerly await your advice on these points and will notify you the moment my WhatsApp is back in operational status. Your understanding and cooperation is greatly appreciated as we tread these waters with the caution and diligence they warrant.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Richard:

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thanks for your response. While waiting for you to fix your WhatsApp, it is good we proceed with email as you suggested as to enable us cover some meaningful ground before switching over to whatsapp.

I will be glad to have your queries as regards to our agreement and the steps that follow thereafter, so I wait!

I want to respond to question you asked in paragraph 4 of your email. Yes, there will be an urgent need for us to involve a public notary here because as you know, I will not be a judge in my own case, as being the attorney to Late Jose Mediavilla, courtesy demands that we engage the service of a public notary to handle the procurement and authentication of all needed documents, the bank will need to support our claims. Let it be that I will introduce you to the bank as we have gather these substantial documents to back up our claims such as a police character report and a sworn affidavit positioning you as the next of kin to late Jose Mediavilla. And the public notary will help us to obtain death certificate of late Jose Mediavilla, which will be required any bank as to empower the bank to transact with you freely without prejudice. 

As you rightly observed in paragraph 5 of your email. Yes; there will be financial obligation in your part to procure the necessary documents that will position you legally as the next of kin to Jose Mediavilla, as a legal professional, I will advise you to raise €1700 as to cover the procurement of aforementioned documents and authentication/notarization expenses. We MUST be in possession of these documents prior to introducing you to the bank to establish claim of the closing account balance as the next of kin.

Every other aspects based on subject review will be subject to discuss as we progresses with this transaction. Please note that we should be conscious of time.

I wait to hear from you soon.

Best regards,

Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, Attorney at Law.

Subject: Clarifications and Next Steps

Dear Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift response and comprehensive explanations. Your commitment to maintaining transparency and momentum in our proceedings is profoundly appreciated. Understanding the crucial role of a public notary and the subsequent steps laid out in your email clarifies the path we are to embark on together in this venture.

I have carefully considered the need for engaging a public notary and obtaining crucial documents such as the death certificate of late Mr. Jose Mediavilla. It is clear that these steps are indispensable to legitimizing my position as the next of kin, thereby cementing our claim with the bank. The role of these documents in facilitating a prejudice-free transaction with the bank is crystal clear, and I fully comprehend the necessity of these initial steps.

Regarding the financial obligations outlined, the sum of €1700 seems reasonable to cover the procurement, authentication, and notarization of the requisite documents. I am in the process of ensuring that the funds are available to meet these obligations promptly. Your guidance on the most appropriate and secure method to handle this transaction would be highly appreciated to ensure that the process is as seamless as possible.

I am compiling a list of detailed queries related to our agreement, the procedural nuances, and potential challenges we might face as suggested. These queries will also touch on the preparation of the police character report and the logistics involved in securing the sworn affidavit, which officially positions me as the next of kin.

Moreover, as we are discussing substantial financial transactions and legal documents, may I suggest we also consider an additional layer of confirmation on the documents received? Perhaps, a short video call at your convenience—just to put a face to the names behind this significant endeavour—could also enhance our mutual trust before advancing to the more complex phases of our agreement.

In anticipation of moving forward, I am aligning all necessary arrangements to meet the financial requirements on my part. I will notify you once everything is set, and in the meantime, I will forward my list of queries for your expert insights.

Once again, I express my gratitude for your understanding and patience as we navigate these preliminary steps. I look forward to your advice on the best methods for the financial transaction and any additional precautions we might need to consider during this phase.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Attn,

I'm <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, a banker by profession,
During our account audit i rediscover dormant account with an open beneficiary status and i'm soliciting your assistance of foreign bank account to re-transfer this fund,
Anticipate reply,
Best Regards,
Mr <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>.
(Acct Officer)

Subject: Re: Dormant Account Opportunity

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. Your email has caught my attention, and I must say, it couldn't have come at a more opportune time. The prospect of assisting in the re-transfer of funds from a dormant account piques my interest, especially considering the potential for making a significant impact with such resources. Your role as a banker lends a degree of authenticity and assurance to this proposition, which I find very reassuring.

Given the context of your communication, I understand the delicate nature of this operation and the necessity for utmost discretion, trust, and efficiency from both parties involved. I'm eager to learn more about the specifics of this dormant account, the origin of the funds, the total amount, and the procedures we will need to follow to ensure a smooth and successful transfer. 

As requested, I can provide a foreign bank account that could facilitate this re-transfer. However, before we proceed further, could you please furnish me with more detailed information about the following:

1. The exact sum of funds currently held in the dormant account.
2. The origins of the account and the reason it has remained unclaimed.
3. The legal and regulatory implications involved in the re-transfer process for both you as the initiating officer and myself as the receiving party.
4. The steps required to ensure the transfer adheres to international banking regulations and laws, ensuring a legitimate and transparent transaction.
5. Any potential fees, taxes, or expenses that might be incurred during the transfer process and how these are to be addressed.

Further, I believe establishing a secure line of communication is paramount. While email is convenient, the sensitivity of this transaction might necessitate more direct or encrypted channels as we progress. Please advise on your preferred method.

In the interest of due diligence, I would also appreciate any documentation or proof of the existence of the dormant account and its open beneficiary status. This would greatly assist in validating the operation and my decision to proceed.

Rest assured of my commitment to confidentiality and my enthusiasm for this potential partnership. I look forward to your swift response and to understanding more about how I can assist in this matter.

Thank you for considering me for this significant undertaking. I am at your service and ready to take the necessary steps as guided by your expertise and instructions.

Best Regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Mohamed Mahemed M. Oun
Minister of Oil and Gas
Government of National Unit

Capital: Tripoli
Joined OPEC: 1962
NOC: National Oil Corporation
http://en.noclibya.com.ly
Tel: +218 244 46 181


===== RE: URGENT CONFIDENTIAL FINANCIAL DEAL=====

As the Minister of Oil and Gas there are countless supply payments which I can privately redirect to a trustworthy partner to make hay while the sun shines, we can confidentially execute financial transactions every week if you are capable. Notice; Oil reserves in Libya are the largest in Africa, and among the ten largest oil reserves globally with 46.4 billion barrels (7.38×10^9 m3).

There are supply payment (GBP27.9M) that you can receive today, the funds is kept in England for instant payment of refinery equipment suppliers, your name will be shortlisted among the beneficiaries of the supply payment, which you can receive very smoothly today. The only document required to back-you-up is affidavit of refinery supply payment beneficiary in your favor, and it must be legalized in England.

Do not bother to reply if you cannot boldly handle this transaction because you must incur little charges to legalize the aforesaid affidavit in your favor, which attracts the commissioner for oat endorsement levy on every affidavit of funds beneficiary. You must reply directly to my private email ( <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> ), I look forward to receive your CIS/KYC which I shall forward to the ministry's international lawyer in England to legalize the needful affidavit in your favor.

The sharing ratio is 35% for you and 65% for me. I repeat, please don't bother to reply if you cannot boldly handle this confidential transaction because you must incur little charges to legalize the aforesaid affidavit in your favor,

Faithfully,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Minister of Oil and Gas
Government of National Unit
Email: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

Subject: Eager Participation in Confidential Financial Deal

Dear Honorable <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

It is with great excitement and anticipation that I respond to your proposition regarding the lucrative opportunity within the Oil and Gas sector of the Libyan Government. Understanding the significance of confidentiality and the magnitude of trust required for such transactions, I assure you of my utmost discretion, commitment, and capability to handle the responsibilities that accompany this venture.

The prospect of engaging in financial transactions with such promising returns, and on a weekly basis no less, is not only thrilling but aligns perfectly with my current financial aspirations and capabilities. The details regarding Libya's position as a leading oil reserve holder only underscore the potential success and benefits of our collaboration.

I am fully prepared to handle the transactions as per your guidance and understand the requirement for incurring minimal charges to legalize the necessary affidavit in England. Such prerequisites are well within my capacity, and I am ready to proceed with the necessary steps to ensure that we can maximize the opportunities at hand.

As requested, I will provide my CIS/KYC documentation for your assessment and to facilitate the necessary legal proceedings. I am keenly aware of the need for a swift and efficient process and am prepared to meet the demands and timelines prescribed by your esteemed office and the ministry's international lawyer in England.

Please consider this email as my formal indication of interest and commitment to partake in this confidential transaction under the terms you have outlined. I understand the sharing ratio of 35% for me and 65% for you, which I find to be more than fair given the scale and potential of this undertaking.

I will also follow up with a direct message to your private email, <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>, with the necessary CIS/KYC information and any further details you require from me to expedite our arrangement. My readiness to incur the charges for the affidavit and any other preparatory requirements stands as a testament to my genuine interest and eagerness to contribute to the success of this venture.

In anticipation of our profitable collaboration, I look forward to the steps we will take together in this journey towards mutual financial achievement. Your guidance on the immediate next steps, especially concerning the preparation and legalization of the needed affidavit, will be invaluable.

Thank you for considering me as a trustworthy partner in this enterprise. I await your further instructions and the details for the ministry's international lawyer in England so we can proceed without delay.

Faithfully,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

ATTENTION BENEFICIARY I AM <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

PLEASE WE ARE VERY SORRY FOR ALL THE PROBLEM THAT YOU HAVE PASSED
THROUGH BECAUSE OF THIS YOUR BELONG PAYMENT OF WHICH YOU FAILED TILL
NOW, FIRST OF ALL, I WANT TO INTRODUCE MY SELF TO YOU, MY NAME IS
RICHARD WEST, I AM THE NEW ELECTED DIRECTOR GENERAL OF USPS POST
OFFICE USA I HAVE BEEN CHOSEN LAST WEEK. I AM WRITING THIS
MAIL WITH DEEP SORROW, I SAW YOUR NAME ON OUR FILE MONDAY THROUGH MY
SEARCHING AS THE ONE OF THE MOST BENEFICIARY WHICH DID NOT RECEIVE
YOUR FUND VALUED $15,8MILLIONS USD WHICH SUPPOSES
TO POST TO YOUR ADDRESS VIA OVERNIGHT DELIVERY.

THE REASON I AM EMAILING YOU TODAY IS TO INFORM YOU THAT THE FORMER
USPS POST . HAS BEEN SACKED OUT SINCE LAST WEEK DUE TO HIS
ILLEGAL WORK UNGODLY ACT, I AM HERE TO INFORM YOU THAT THE ONLY THING
THAT WILL LEAD YOU TO RECEIVE YOUR FUND IS BY TRUSTING ME AND FOLLOW MY
DIRECTION. YOU SENT LOT MONEY TO HIM IN ORDER TO GET YOUR FUND
WHICH FAILS. THEREFORE I AM TO TELL YOU THAT THE REASON YOU DID NOT
RECEIVE YOUR FUND IS BECAUSE YOU DID NOT FOLLOW THE DIRECT WAY TO GET
YOUR FUND BUT TO EXTORTING MONEY FROM YOU IN VARIOUS QUARTERS. DUE TO


THE FORMER MANAGER'S ATTITUDE WE THEREFORE RESOLVE TO SACKED HIM OUT
SINCE HE DIDN'T KEEP OUR INSTRUCTION,

ACCORDING TO THE INSTRUCTION PASSED TO THIS POST DEPARTMENT FROM
THE OFFICE OF THE (HIGH COURT SERVICES) THIS WILL DULY
GUARANTEE AND COVER THE MONEY AS BEING LEGITIMATELY ACQUIRED FROM THE
US GOVERNMENT. SO I WANT YOU TO KNOW THAT YOUR FUND OF $15.8MILLIONS
USD IS STILL WITH THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT ACCOUNT BUT IT WILL RELEASE
IMMEDIATELY TO THIS POST OFFICE AS SOON AS YOU OBTAIN THE (FUND
RELEASE ORDER CERTIFICATES)
ACCORDING TO OUR MESSENGER WHICH WENT TO THE DC HIGH COURT

TOLD US THAT IT WILL COST YOU THE SUM OF $45.00 ONLY FOR THE OBTAIN OF

SO HE TOLD US THAT THEY WILL ISSUE IT WITHIN ONE DAY IF THE FEE WILL

WANT IT GOLD CARD OR DAILY PER OK I WILL BE AWAITING TO HEAR FROM YOU

CARD FOR $45.00 SEND IT TO ME.

I AM HERE GIVING YOUR GUARANTEE AND ALSO 100 % PERCENT ASSURANCE THAT
THIS IS THE ONLY MONEY YOU WILL PAY AND AFTER YOU PAY IT YOU WILL

ITUNES COPY IN ORDER TO ENABLE US OBTAIN THIS NEEDED
CERTIFICATE SOON.

REGARDS,
MR.RICHARD WEST

Subject: Re: Urgent Update on My Fund Release Process

Dear Mr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. I must express my relief at receiving communication directly from the newly elected Director General of USPS Post Office USA. It is a breath of fresh air to know that my long-awaited fund valued at $15.8 million USD is on the verge of being processed and dispatched to my address. Your candid explanation has shed light on the difficulties encountered in the past, and I am grateful for your sincerity and the proactive steps taken by your office to rectify this situation.
